G

getAllTableTitles() - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
Get all titles of table.
getCountOnSubTab(String, String) - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
Get count on subtab.
getCurrentPageNumber() - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
Returns the current page number
getCurrentPitStopName() - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
 
getLabelCount() - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
 
getLoggedInUser() - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
 
getSmartAccount() - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
 
getTableCellValue(int, int) - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
Get any table cell value by passing row index and column index from records, such as for rowIndex = 2 & columnIndex = 3 will get "System name" value.
getTableColumnCount() - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
Get total number of count for available Columns.
getTableRowCount() - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
Get total count of available Rows in table.
getTotalCountOfPages() - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
 
goToPrevOrNext(String) - Method in class com.cisco.utils.AppUtils
On prevOrNext prev, PREV is selected.
